title: Midnight Rich Portuguese Almond Pie
description: A dense, nutty egg‑free pie that blends Portuguese sweetness with a midnight craving, featuring a rich almond filling soaked in grape juice.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Grease a 23cm pie dish.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, all‑purpose flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt for the crust.
Stir in olive oil and 1 tbsp grape juice until a crumbly dough forms. Press dough into the pie dish, creating an even 1‑cm rim.
Let the crust chill for 5 minutes while you prepare the filling.
In another bowl, mix the roasted sliced almonds with almond flour, remaining brown sugar, cinnamon, vanilla extract, 30ml grape juice, maple syrup, chia seeds, and water.
Stir until the mixture is thick and holds together; the chia‑egg binder will set as it bakes.
Spoon the almond filling over the pre‑baked crust, smoothing the top.
Bake for 20–25 minutes, or until the crust is golden and the filling is set.
Remove from oven and let cool in the dish for 10 minutes before slicing. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
